description: A woman who writes a serialized manga about shogi (Japanese chess) in a girl's manga magazine. She is shy and paranoid, and often receives various criticisms from her assistant Mizuki Hazama. name: Saki Hyuuga
description: Saki is a cheerful athletic girl and a member of Yuunagi Middle School's girls' softball team. She is excellent at sports but not very good at school (but still a bright individual), loves sweets and has a large appetite. Although Saki appears childish at times, she is lenient and gregarious, and her cheerful and easygoing personality often makes people happy and befriended. Her family runs the PANPAKA Pan Bakery. name: Seyzelk
description: The leader of the elite adventurer group "Sword of Flame." Despite his intimidating appearance, he possesses a gentle nature. Not only is he a formidable combatant, but he also possesses keen intellect; he leads his members through mutual trust, making him a leader worthy of the title. His skills include Hand-to-Hand Combat (Rank 3), Swordsmanship (Rank 2), and Fortitude (Rank 1). He is kind to [Ivy](https://anilist.co/character/294131/Ivy).

name: Yuuta Iridatsu
description: Resident of room 103 in Korai House, who becomes a ghost through a mysterious out of body experience. He tries to keep a cool facade, but he has a strong sense of justice, compassion, and naivete. When he sees a girl's underwear, he gets a strong nosebleed and loses consciousness. ~!In episode 6, it is revealed that Yuuta is biologically female.
